title: NIT Calicut – Placement Officer – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Placement Officer. Candidates with MBA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 12-05-2026, and closes on 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Calicut official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Placement Officer Recruitment 2026.
